name: Fresca Cake with Maraschino Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream butter and shortening until smooth.
3. Add sugar gradually, beating well after each addition.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, ensuring they are fully incorporated.
5. Mix in soda pop, baking powder, vanilla extract, lemon rind, and lime rind.
6. Stir in sifted flour until just combined.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan(s) and bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Turn off oven when cake is done to avoid overbaking.
